task_description: Implement Phase 10 (FINAL): Replace all remaining stub modules (XDR, SIEM, SOC, Cloud, Plugin, Updates, Sandbox, HIDS, Telemetry) with full production implementations including unit tests. After completion, zero stub modules should remain.

verification.summary: Build succeeds cleanly. All 1053 test cases pass. Post-review fixes applied: (1) SIEM correlation rules now properly constrain matches to timeWindowSeconds, (2) thread-unsafe std::mktime/std::gmtime replaced with timegm/gmtime_r, (3) plugin reload is now atomic (single lock_guard), (4) Cloud downloadPolicies uses nlohmann_json for safe JSON construction, (5) atomic<int> counters in XDR/SIEM/SOC/Cloud replaced with plain int under mutex for consistency.
